fields.UseVoiceNormalization: Whether to normalize the incoming voice data.
fields.NormalizationThreshold: When below this volume, boost so the voice is louder.
fields.NoiseGateThreshold: The threshold that audio needs to be above for the voice to get through.
fields.NoiseGateAttack: This indicates how fast the noise gate responds to an incoming sound that is louder than the threshold volume. Larger values will result in a slower volume fade in, while smaller ones will make the volume ramp up quicker.
fields.NoiseGateHold: This controls how long it takes for the noise gate to begin to close after the microphone input volume falls below the threshold volume.
fields.NoiseGateRelease: This setting controls how fast the noise gate closes after the incoming audio has quieted again.
